Natuvion GmbHHomepage

Sales Administrative Support

  • On-site
    • Malvern, Pennsylvania, United States
  • Sales

A multicultural, global work environment with colleagues across multiple countries. Great career development opportunities with ability to travel.

Job description

We are seeking a Sales Operations Assistant to work on sales opportunities. This role will focus on clerical, documentation, and reporting tasks, ensuring smooth operations, timely deliverables, and accurate recordkeeping.

This full-time position is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and eager to gain hands-on experience across sales operations and financial processes. An interest in global collaboration and occasional travel is encouraged, as you may support international colleagues and projects.

Job requirements

Sales Support

  • Maintain and update Hubspot CRM records (contacts, opportunities, pipeline stages, etc.)

  • Assist in preparing sales proposals, RFP responses, and supporting documentation

  • Support in using Hubspot to maintain and update sales dashboards and reports

  • Track and follow up on outstanding quotes, renewals, and customer legal documentation

  • Assist the sales team in developing and improving processes, including building templates for contracts

  • Any experience with SAP and or willingness to learn about data migration processes would be an advantage

Qualifications

  • 1–3 years of experience in an administrative (sales/project support preferred)

  • High Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint) is required

  • Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot) is a plus

  • Experience supporting documentation processes such as RFPs, contracts, or change requests is a plus

  • Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI preferred

  • Ability to be client-facing and manage client expectations professionally

  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills

  • Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment

  • Proactive, dependable, and team-oriented mindset

  • Interest in global business and willingness to travel as opportunities arise

On-site
  • Malvern, Pennsylvania, United States
$20 - $20 per hour
Sales
